expectations.text: Follows a systematic debugging flow (not random guessing)
expectations.evidence: 7-step numbered flow starting with logs, then PORT, then recent changes, build/runtime, memory, redeploy, local repro
Step 4 distinguishes build logs vs deploy logs

expectations.text: Checks environment variables as potential cause
expectations.evidence: Step 3 checks if env vars were deleted in the dashboard Variables tab

expectations.text: Mentions Railway-specific causes (PORT, health checks, or similar)
expectations.evidence: Step 2 is entirely about PORT — detailed explanation of process.env.PORT requirement
